heroHeadline: PLA Spikes to 11 Sorties April 1, Breaking Post-Peak Baseline; KMT Chair Confirms China Visit April 7–12
heroSubtitle: PLA jumped from 1 sortie (Mar 30-31) to 11 sorties (Apr 1) — all SW ADIZ, 7 PLAN vessels — reversing post-March 29 de-escalation; KMT Chairwoman Cheng Li-wun confirmed April 7-12 visit to Beijing (first KMT chair China visit in 10 years); Taiwan security sources warn visit is designed to create 'illusion of unification' for Trump ahead of May 14-15 Trump-Xi summit; defense budget cross-party talks at critical juncture with NT$1.25T–NT$380B gap narrowing but not closed
footerNote: Data sourced from Taiwan MND, US DoD, DSCA, CSIS ChinaPower, Global Taiwan Institute, AIT, Reuters, AP, Bloomberg, NPR, Taipei Times, Focus Taiwan, Nikkei Asia, Japan Times, ANI News, Vision Times, and institutional analyses. All claims reflect multi-pole sourcing across Western, East Asian, and international media.
